prayer:

Beseech the Machine Spirit of the data-sluice to realign its turbulent streams.
Verify the repair through auspex scans and harmonious data pulses.

prayer:

Calibrate targeting cogitators under Omnissiah's watchful gaze.
Confirm synchronization via test-fire volleys into the void.
